name: Alter Self
description: You alter your physical form. Choose one of the following options: (1) Aquatic Adaptation — gills + swim speed equal to walk speed; (2) Change Appearance — disguise yourself as another humanoid of your size; (3) Natural Weapons — grow claws / horns / hooves / fangs that count as natural weapons (1d6 + STR mod magical damage). On later turns, take the Magic action to swap option. Effects are narrative — the AIGM is the source of truth for any ability check or combat consequence.
